prompts.title: Example Action Prompts
prompts.subtitle: Practical tasks to move your freelance business forward
items: Schedule and conduct check-in calls with your top 3 existing clients this week
Create and send a client testimonial request email to 5 satisfied clients
Create a professional email signature and update it across all your communication channels
Draft and send a personalized follow-up email to 3 prospects from recent networking events
Create a client communication style guide and share it with your top 5 clients
Schedule and conduct quarterly business reviews with your 3 highest-value clients
